input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.10.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.4.10.3
            TITLE: the hand cart must:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.4.10.3: The Hand Cart must:
EV.4.10.3 The Hand Cart must:  
a. Be able to carry the load of the Accumulator Container(s) without tipping over  
b. Contain a minimum of two wheels  
c. Have a brake that must be: 
• Released only using a dead man type switch (where the brake is always on except 
when released by pushing and holding a handle) or by manually lifting part of the 
cart off the ground 
• Able to stop the Hand Cart with a fully loaded Accumulator Container

final_answer:
The Hand Cart must:
EV.4.10.3 The Hand Cart must:
a. Be able to carry the load of the Accumulator Container(s) without tipping over
b. Contain a minimum of two wheels
c. Have a brake that must be:
• Released only using a dead man type switch (where the brake is always on except when released by pushing and holding a handle) or by manually lifting part of the cart off the ground
• Able to stop the Hand Cart with a fully loaded Accumulator Container
